case_title: YUFEI OU VS. JOSEPH ANTHONY HAOHAO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-22-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-22-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF YUFEI OU IS PRESENT ASSISTED BY CERIFIED COURT INTERPRETER REBECCA CHAU. DEFENDANT JOSEPH ANTHONY HAOHAO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TRANSDEV IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY MARY MCLAIN, GENERAL MANAGER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
